Bathed in natural light, the spacious interiors offer the classic charm and craftsmanship synonymous with Piedmont living.

A gracious Spanish-inspired living room flows seamlessly into the formal dining room, creating an ideal setting for both everyday living and sophisticated entertaining. Coveted Crocker Highlands 4 Bedroom Home for Rent

Available July 1, 2026 premium 4BR/3.5BA single-family home in highly desirable Crocker Highlands neighborhood of Oakland. 2,634 sq ft with original 1920 architecture and exceptional amenities.

This beautiful 2634 square foot Tuscan/Mediterranean inspired home is within walking distance to Crocker Elementary School - a nationally recognized Blue Ribbon Award school. The property is situated in a tree lined, family friendly street with wonderful neighbors.

The living room off of the entry brings in great natural lighting, with french doors that lead to the back yard. The formal dining room and cozy media room are adjacent to an open kitchen, which includes all stainless steel appliances. The kitchen doors open to a spacious backyard featuring an outdoor kitchen and pergola adorned with beautiful wisteria vines. The outdoor kitchen is complete with a built-in Dacor gas grill, sink, warming drawer and mini refrigerator. The first floor also includes a bedroom and bathroom with shower. The second floor includes a luxurious master suite with a spacious bathroom complete with double sinks, a wet room style shower and deep jacuzzi tub for two, two walk-in closets, and a deck. The second floor also includes a second bedroom with a large private deck, a third bedroom overlooking the manicured backyard, laundry room conveniently located near bedrooms, linen closet and a full bath. This home is perfect for entertaining with recessed speakers throughout the first floor of the home, including surround sound speakers in the media room.

Highlights:
- Solar panels reduce electricity costs significantly
- Monthly housekeeping service included (provided by landlord)
- Large private backyard with pergola and outdoor kitchen
- Two private balconies
- 3.5 bathrooms (above standard for 4BR vintage homes)
- 500+ sq ft above-ground basement storage with a second refrigerator
- 4-car private driveway
- Walking distance to Crocker Highlands Elementary (top-rated)
- Hardwood floors throughout
- High-end kitchen appliances including warming drawer, trash compactor, two refrigerators
- Monthly rent includes professional landscaping services and once per month professional housecleaning services.

This is a rare rental in a neighborhood of mostly owner-occupied homes. Easy access to Lakeshore Avenue restaurants and shopping, Lake Merritt, downtown Oakland, BART, and I-580.

Additional Amenities Include:
*Hardwood floors throughout
*Fireplace
*Low noise dishwasher
*Kitchen trash compactor
*French door refrigerator
*Built in microwave, oven and warming drawer
*Ample shelving and drawer spaces
*Laundry room with high efficiency front loading washer and dryer
*Coat closet near entry
*Cat 6 ethernet wiring throughout the house
*Unfinished 500+ sq ft above ground basement with windows, great storage space and room for a gym (in addition to 2,634 sq ft. on 1st and second floors)
*20 foot tall lemon tree and beautiful, mature landscaping
*Driveway easily supports four cars and there is plenty of street parking
*Minutes to Lakeshore and Grand Avenues, Grand Lake Theater Saturday Farmer's Market, Lake Merritt, Piedmont parks and business district, Montclair Village, 580 Freeway access
